betterquesting:10.desc:8:
The spren, they too are in tune with Stormlight magic.
After the Arbiter's journey into Kashan, as the Testificate civilization was approaching its apex in Lyndenwyrm, the Spren followed him. What I now know ties the final knot in the history of Terra, and why it holds the power it does now.
Stormlight was the catalyst for the bond between the Spren, the Dragons and the Arbiter. The civilization of Lyndenwyrm, though, did not last long after forging of this pact.
The invaders came, and the Testificates had to flee their homeworld. Led by the Spren, the Arbiter led his people to Terra.
While the bond of Stormlight remained, the Spren did not follow the Testificates to Terra. Instead, they left a mark of their bond. 
The power of prosperity, in the Form of Dimensional Shards. 
They were left as a symbol of loyalty and friendship, a gift, but the power held into this gift was too strong, and it turned Terra into the battlefield where I entered this story.
Glory, hope, balance, knowledge. The tenents of the people of the Arbiter, channeled into crystals, producing a powerful bond.
And now, it is up to me to restore this bond. 
As the Lord of Gluttony, Undead Lord, I restitute this powers to their owners. The bond between Kashan and Terra, once forged my the Arbiter, is now recast by the heir of the Meatball Man
The Testificates will have to continue on their own for a little longer, until their lord's return. But they will not be alone, the Spren will be with them. 
And the dragons, soon, they shall awaken to their bond too!
